equipmentMods.belt: Lightning Plasma: Fires an additional Lightning Plasmas, and deals an additional 5% based on Lighting Plasma range.
equipmentMods.goblet: Electric Dragons: Each dragon has a 30% chance to shoot a burst of electric meteors that deal 15% damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Vortex: Gain an additional 4% Lightning Damage blessing when vortexes collide, and gain 5% damage for every Vortex.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 10% increased damage. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
equipmentMods.boots: Increased 10% chance to spawn a container when killing an elite.

equipmentMods.belt: Chain Lightning: When a link connects, it also strikes the target with a lightning bolt from the sky that deals the 35% of Chain Lightning damage.
equipmentMods.goblet: Ferocity of Wolves: Your wolves now leap an additional times.
equipmentMods.horn: Ferocity of Wolves: One of your wolves will transform into an Electric Bat. Bats leap twice as much.
equipmentMods.trinket: Ferocity of Wolves: Your wolves increase their damage by 5% with each leap.
